title: Shenanigans Datapack
description: This is the Datapack made for the Shenanigans Modpack
body:
This is the DataPack for the [Shenanigans Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/shenanigans).

It adds oxidation recipes using the spout for almost all copper items and blocks, it adds a way to craft mob drops in peaceful mode and a "fix" for [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries) kinda broken colored present gifts.

Also some tagging for compatibility

Its still WIP and there will be a lot more additions to be added.
